en: Oh, shit. There's no such thing as easy time in the hole.
That's right. A week in the hole is like a year. Damn straight.
ko: 맞아. 구치소에서 일주일은 1년 같아. 정말 그래.

en: I had Mr. Mozart to keep me company.
So they let you tote that record player down there, huh?
It was in here.
And in here.
That's the beauty of music.
They can't get that from you.
Haven't you ever felt that way about music?
ko: 음악에 대해 그렇게 느껴본 적 없어?

en: Well, I played the main harmonica as a younger man.
Lost interest in it, though.
Didn't make much sense in here.
Well, here's where it makes the most sense.
You need it so you don't forget.
Forget?
Forget that there are places in the world
ko: 세상에 돌로 만들어지지 않은 곳이 있다는 걸.

en: that aren't made out of stone.
That there's a...
There's something...
There's something inside
that they can't get to.
